findings.title: CVE-2026-5281 — Chrome Dawn WebGPU Zero-Day Actively Exploited, Added to CISA KEV
findings.summary: A use-after-free in Chrome's Dawn WebGPU implementation (CVE-2026-5281) is being actively exploited in the wild and was added to CISA KEV on April 1 with a 14-day patch deadline, marking the fourth Chrome zero-day of 2026.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3502 — TrueConf Zero-Day 'Operation TrueChaos' — Chinese Espionage via Update Supply Chain
findings.summary: Check Point disclosed Operation TrueChaos, a Chinese-nexus espionage campaign exploiting a missing integrity check in TrueConf's update mechanism to deliver Havoc C2 to Southeast Asian government targets since early 2026.

findings.title: Hasbro Confirms Cyberattack — Multi-Week Recovery Expected
findings.summary: Hasbro disclosed via SEC filing that unauthorized access to its network was detected on March 28, with some systems taken offline and recovery expected to take several weeks.

findings.title: AGEWHEEZE RAT — CERT-UA Impersonation Campaign Targets Ukrainian Organizations
findings.affected_technology: Ukrainian government, medical, financial, and educational organizations
findings.summary: Threat actors tracked as UAC-0255 impersonated CERT-UA to distribute AGEWHEEZE, a Go-based RAT with WebSocket C2, targeting over 1 million email addresses across Ukrainian state and private sector organizations.

noted.summary: Device code phishing-as-a-service platform targeting Microsoft 365 accounts, 340+ organizations impacted since February 2026.
New Telegram-promoted malware-as-a-service with RAT, stealer, and keylogging capabilities.
Found in 50+ Google Play apps with 2.3 million device infections; mobile-only, out of primary scope.
New credential stealer with USB spreading capability dropped via ClickFix attacks.
Anthropic accidentally published Claude Code source code in npm package v2.1.88; packaging error, no credentials exposed.
Heap buffer overflow in Chrome WebGL fixed alongside CVE-2026-5281, reported by the same researcher.
Additional use-after-free in Chrome Dawn fixed alongside CVE-2026-5281, reported by the same researcher.
